WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
BRAZIL-SOUTH COAST.
DNC 01.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 241600Z TO 241800Z APR:
   A. IN AREA BOUND BY
      23-02.03S 043-51.03W, 23-02.00S 043-35.03W,
      23-04.03S 043-35.03W, 23-05.03S 043-51.03W.
   B. IN AREA WITHIN 5.5 MILES OF 23-04.03S 043-52.03W.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 1234/18.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 241900Z APR 18.
